## Re-attributions (collision table)

- 'Berite Novice' -> Josip Jurčič (editorial notice; keep-first, attribution pending closer verification)
- 'Rokovnjači' -> Josip Jurčič, Janko Kersnik (Jurčič began it, Kersnik finished it after his death (NOTES.md))
- 'Rokovnjači (Ljubljanski zvon)' -> Josip Jurčič, Janko Kersnik (serial printing of the joint Rokovnjači)
- 'Levstikovo pismo Jurčiču iz leta 1868' -> Fran Levstik (letter BY Levstik to Jurčič)
- 'Tugomer' -> Josip Jurčič, Fran Levstik (Levstik's rewrite of Jurčič's tragedy - joint (NOTES.md: same tragedy))
- 'Pismo Josipa Murna Ivanu Cankarju, marec 1898' -> Josip Murn (the letter is BY Murn; it sits in both correspondents' shards)
